# einHaru Collective
> Berlin-based boutique curating minimalist Korean and Japanese independent fashion. EU-wide shipping from Berlin. Limited production runs, no fast fashion.

## About
- [About einHaru](https://www.einharu.com/about): Brand story, philosophy, and operations
- [Sizing Guide](https://www.einharu.com/sizing-guide): Size reference for Korean and Japanese fits

## Shop
- [Full collection](https://www.einharu.com/): All available products with EU shipping
- [New arrivals](https://www.einharu.com/coming-soon): Latest drops and upcoming pieces

## Editorial: philosophy and context
- [Minimalist Fashion in Berlin](https://www.einharu.com/minimalist-fashion-berlin): Philosophy, Berlin context, Seoul influence, brand concept
- [Seoul–Berlin Minimalist Style Guide](https://www.einharu.com/seoul-berlin-minimalist-style-guide): Proportion rules, capsule formula, Korean vs EU fit
- [Korean Minimalist Fashion Guide](https://www.einharu.com/korean-minimalist-fashion-guide): What defines the aesthetic, key silhouettes, how to start
- [Japanese vs Korean Fashion](https://www.einharu.com/japanese-vs-korean-fashion): Comparison of two minimalist traditions
- [Quiet Luxury Fashion](https://www.einharu.com/quiet-luxury-fashion): What it means, how Korean minimalism overlaps
- [Vegan Leather Fashion](https://www.einharu.com/vegan-leather-fashion): Materials, finish, and styling considerations

## Editorial: how to wear
- [What to Wear in Berlin](https://www.einharu.com/what-to-wear-berlin): Seasonal styling for the city
- [How to Style Oversized Shirts](https://www.einharu.com/how-to-style-oversized-shirt): Proportion, layering, and silhouette
- [How to Style Wide-Leg Trousers](https://www.einharu.com/how-to-style-wide-leg-trousers): Volume, fit, and footwear pairing
- [Minimalist Summer Outfits](https://www.einharu.com/minimalist-summer-outfits): Light layering and warm-weather capsule

## Editorial: shopping
- [Where to Buy Korean and Japanese Fashion in Europe](https://www.einharu.com/buy-korean-fashion-europe): Buying guide, EU shipping info, sizing notes
- [Japanese Minimalist Fashion in Europe](https://www.einharu.com/japanese-minimalist-fashion-europe): Where to find it, brand profiles
- [Independent Fashion Boutiques in Berlin](https://www.einharu.com/independent-fashion-boutiques-berlin): Curated list of boutiques worth visiting

## Local Guide
- [Korean Fashion in Berlin](https://www.einharu.com/korean-fashion-berlin): Berlin-specific FAQ, shipping, sizing, exclusivity, pop-ups

## Support
- [FAQ](https://www.einharu.com/faq): Ordering, shipping, sizing, returns
- [Returns](https://www.einharu.com/returns): 14-day return policy, conditions

## Key facts
- Based in: Berlin, Germany
- Ships to: EU-wide and select international destinations, tracked, dispatched from Berlin
- Free shipping: €80+ (Germany) / €150+ (EU)
- Delivery: 3 to 7 working days within EU
- Designers: Independent Seoul and Tokyo labels, small production runs
- Contact: einharu@gmail.com
